text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehehe! I won! ♪ I actually won, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh. The race is over, but my heart won't stop
pounding!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
The cheers that erupted when I crossed the finish
line! The fervor of the winner's circle! It was all so
incredible!
choice_data_list:
Sounds like you've made another fantastic
memory!

Sounds like you've made another fantastic
memory!

And you can do it all again... if you win your
next race.

And you can do it all again... if you win your
next race.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
The cheers that erupted when I crossed the finish
line! The fervor of the winner's circle! It was all so
incredible!
choice_data_list:
Sounds like you've made another fantastic
memory!

Sounds like you've made another fantastic
memory!

And you can do it all again... if you win your
next race.

And you can do it all again... if you win your
next race.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Of course! I'll never ever forget today's race!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
And it's not just that I won, it's the experience of
pulling it off with you! I think that's what I
treasure most about today.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
That reminds me! ♪ Let's take a picture to
remember things by! Okay, selfie mode... on.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Over here, Trainer. ♪ Would you mind coming
closer?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... As long as I have this picture, no matter
how many years pass, I'll be able to remember
exactly what happened today in vivid detail. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion looks extremely pleased, and our
memorial selfie comes out great.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I will make sure to! But that means we mustn't
let our guard down. We've got to keep up this
momentum! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
This might seem sudden, but with that in mind,
would you mind if we did some training when we
get back?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I want to get back on the track while the
experience is still fresh in my mind.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. Right, let's aim for another splendid
win next time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion has already set her gallant gaze on
the next race.
